title: Alkonost returns linked Limited Summons when source invalidates

card.rawText: During your turn, you may summon a 'Harpy' or 'Alkonost' from your deck or hand as a Limited Summon. For each, add +1 Atk Dice and +1 Modifier to this card. Return Limited Summons to your hand if this creature leaves the field or this effect is negated.

plan.title: Alkonost returns linked Limited Summons when source invalidates
plan.summary: Start with an Alkonost-linked Limited Summon and verify it returns to hand when Alkonost leaves or the effect is negated.

notes: Place Alkonost on player_1 field as primary.
Put Harpy in player_1 cemetery before the source invalidation route seeds the anchored Limited Summon.
Return Limited Summons to your hand if this creature leaves the field or this effect is negated.

steps: Return linked Limited Summon(s) to hand.
Inspect player_1 field creatures and hand.
manualVerification: Cleanup should also run if the Alkonost effect is negated without the source leaving field.
riskNotes: This validates source-linked Limited Summon cleanup to hand.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_046_alkonost-046-e03 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
